requirement_topic.en: EMC and Wireless Type Approval — GSO EMC Standards and CRA Radio Approval for Power Banks
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与无线型号核准——移动电源的GSO EMC标准及CRA无线核准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁兼容與無線型號核准——行動電源的GSO EMC標準及CRA無線核准

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, protection ICs, and display) are electronic apparatus and are assessed for electromagnetic compatibility against GSO EMC standards (GSO adoptions of IEC/CISPR emission and immunity texts) applied by QGOSM. Qatar's mains supply is 240 V, 50 Hz — the same 50 Hz frequency as China, though the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V, so any mains-charging behaviour and labelling must reference 240 V / 50 Hz. Critically, if the power bank includes any wireless function (Qi wireless charging output, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, NFC), it is radio equipment and requires type approval from the CRA (Communications Regulatory Authority of Qatar) before it can be imported, sold, or operated. CRA approval governs permitted frequency bands, power limits, and equipment registration for the Qatari spectrum. EMC conformity feeds the QGOSM conformity-assessment file; CRA radio approval is a separate, mandatory step for any wireless variant.
summary.zh: 移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出、保护IC及显示屏的便携式电池组）属于电子装置，须依据QGOSM适用的GSO EMC标准（GSO对IEC/CISPR辐射与抗扰度文本的采纳）评估电磁兼容。卡塔尔市电为240 V、50 Hz——频率与中国同为50 Hz，但额定电压不同于中国的220/380 V，因此任何市电充电行为及标识须以240 V / 50 Hz为准。关键在于：若移动电源包含任何无线功能（Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙电量指示、NFC），即属无线设备，在进口、销售或使用前须取得卡塔尔通信监管局（CRA）的型号核准。CRA核准管辖卡塔尔频谱的许可频段、功率限值及设备注册。EMC合格评定进入QGOSM合格评定文件；CRA无线核准对任何无线型号而言是独立的强制环节。
summary.zht: 行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出、保護IC及顯示幕的便攜式電池組）屬於電子裝置，須依據QGOSM適用的GSO EMC標準（GSO對IEC/CISPR輻射與抗擾度文本的採納）評估電磁兼容。卡塔爾市電為240 V、50 Hz——頻率與中國同為50 Hz，但額定電壓不同於中國的220/380 V，因此任何市電充電行為及標識須以240 V / 50 Hz為準。關鍵在於：若行動電源包含任何無線功能（Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙電量指示、NFC），即屬無線設備，在進口、銷售或使用前須取得卡塔爾通信監管局（CRA）的型號核准。CRA核准管轄卡塔爾頻譜的許可頻段、功率限值及設備登記。EMC合格評定進入QGOSM合格評定文件；CRA無線核准對任何無線型號而言是獨立的強制環節。

standards_or_laws: GSO EMC standards — GSO adoptions of CISPR/IEC emission and immunity texts (e.g. CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 family), applied by QGOSM
CRA (Communications Regulatory Authority of Qatar) — type approval and registration of radio/telecom equipment, including wireless charging and short-range devices
QGOSM conformity assessment framework — EMC evidence as part of the regulated-product technical file

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements use GB/T 9254.1-2021 (emissions, Class B IT/multimedia equipment) and GB/T 17618-2015 (immunity). Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval under MIIT, which is specific to Chinese allocated frequency bands and power limits. Neither the GB/T EMC reports nor the SRRC approval is recognised in Qatar: Qatar applies GSO EMC standards through QGOSM, and wireless approval must come from the CRA against Qatari/GCC spectrum rules. A Chinese power bank tuned to Chinese frequency allocations (e.g. specific Qi or BLE channel/power configurations) may need re-characterisation and a fresh CRA submission.
summary.zh: 中国国内EMC要求采用GB/T 9254.1-2021（辐射，B类信息技术/多媒体设备）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗扰度）。含无线功能的产品须依据工业和信息化部取得SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国分配的频段和功率限值。GB/T EMC报告及SRRC核准在卡塔尔均不被认可：卡塔尔通过QGOSM适用GSO EMC标准，无线核准须由CRA依据卡塔尔/海合会频谱规则出具。按中国频率分配调校的中国移动电源（如特定Qi或BLE的频道/功率配置）可能须重新表征并向CRA重新提交。
summary.zht: 中國國內EMC要求採用GB/T 9254.1-2021（輻射，B類信息技術/多媒體設備）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗擾度）。含無線功能的產品須依據工業和信息化部取得SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國分配的頻段和功率限值。GB/T EMC報告及SRRC核准在卡塔爾均不被認可：卡塔爾通過QGOSM適用GSO EMC標準，無線核准須由CRA依據卡塔爾/海合會頻譜規則出具。按中國頻率分配調校的中國行動電源（如特定Qi或BLE的頻道/功率配置）可能須重新表徵並向CRA重新提交。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for wireless products sold in China

gap.en: Two distinct Qatar gaps with no transferable Chinese equivalent: (1) EMC — power banks must demonstrate conformity to the GSO EMC standards applied by QGOSM; a domestic GB/T 9254 report is not accepted as standalone evidence and must be reconciled to the GSO/CISPR texts within the QGOSM file. (2) Wireless type approval — any Qi, Bluetooth, or NFC function triggers mandatory CRA type approval; SRRC approval does not transfer, the device must transmit only in CRA-permitted bands and within CRA power limits, and CRA registration is a precondition of lawful import and sale. Mains-charging variants must also reference Qatar's 240 V / 50 Hz supply (50 Hz matches China; the 240 V nominal differs from China's 220 V). Exporters should plan for a separate CRA submission whenever a wireless feature is present.
gap.zh: 卡塔尔存在两项无可转移中国对应制度的差距：（1）EMC——移动电源须证明符合QGOSM适用的GSO EMC标准；国内GB/T 9254报告不被接受为独立证据，须在QGOSM文件中与GSO/CISPR文本对应。（2）无线型号核准——任何Qi、蓝牙或NFC功能均触发强制CRA型号核准；SRRC核准不可转移，设备只能在CRA许可频段并在CRA功率限值内发射，CRA注册是合法进口与销售的前提。含市电充电的型号还须以卡塔尔240 V / 50 Hz供电为准（50 Hz与中国一致；240 V额定不同于中国220 V）。只要存在无线功能，出口商应规划独立的CRA提交。
gap.zht: 卡塔爾存在兩項無可轉移中國對應制度的差距：（1）EMC——行動電源須證明符合QGOSM適用的GSO EMC標準；國內GB/T 9254報告不被接受為獨立證據，須在QGOSM文件中與GSO/CISPR文本對應。（2）無線型號核准——任何Qi、藍牙或NFC功能均觸發強制CRA型號核准；SRRC核准不可轉移，設備只能在CRA許可頻段並在CRA功率限值內發射，CRA登記是合法進口與銷售的前提。含市電充電的型號還須以卡塔爾240 V / 50 Hz供電為準（50 Hz與中國一致；240 V額定不同於中國220 V）。只要存在無線功能，出口商應規劃獨立的CRA提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GSO EMC conformity applied by QGOSM for power banks within regulated scope; CRA type approval mandatory before import/sale/operation for any wireless function (Qi / Bluetooth / NFC); device must operate within CRA-permitted bands and power limits on Qatar's 240 V / 50 Hz grid
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

source.publisher: Communications Regulatory Authority of Qatar (CRA) — Type Approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Power banks are electronic apparatus assessed for EMC against GSO standards applied by QGOSM, and any wireless variant (Qi, Bluetooth, NFC) additionally requires mandatory CRA type approval against Qatari spectrum rules before import or sale. Chinese GB/T 9254 EMC reports and SRRC radio approvals do not transfer to Qatar. Mains-charging behaviour and labelling must reference Qatar's 240 V / 50 Hz supply (50 Hz matches China; nominal voltage differs).
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 移动电源属电子装置，须依据QGOSM适用的GSO标准评估EMC；任何无线型号（Qi、蓝牙、NFC）在进口或销售前还须依据卡塔尔频谱规则取得强制CRA型号核准。中国GB/T 9254 EMC报告及SRRC无线核准不可转移至卡塔尔。市电充电行为及标识须以卡塔尔240 V / 50 Hz供电为准（50 Hz与中国一致；额定电压不同）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 行動電源屬電子裝置，須依據QGOSM適用的GSO標準評估EMC；任何無線型號（Qi、藍牙、NFC）在進口或銷售前還須依據卡塔爾頻譜規則取得強制CRA型號核准。中國GB/T 9254 EMC報告及SRRC無線核准不可轉移至卡塔爾。市電充電行為及標識須以卡塔爾240 V / 50 Hz供電為準（50 Hz與中國一致；額定電壓不同）。
